title: Claude Code AI SEO: How to Rank #1 with Claude Code
summary: Julian Goldie presents an agentic SEO system that integrates Claude Code with a user's own Google Search Console data to identify rankable keywords and automatically generate and deploy SEO content across multiple sites. The approach bypasses common keyword tools to find less competitive opportunities, with a demonstrated case of increasing site traffic from 2 to 200+ daily clicks.
writeup: The video demonstrates an agentic SEO system that connects Claude Code to a site's own Google Search Console data to surface rankable keywords, then generates and deploys SEO content across multiple sites automatically. By pulling from Search Console rather than standard keyword tools, the workflow targets less competitive opportunities that conventional research often misses. The featured case shows daily clicks rising from 2 to over 200. The takeaway is a concrete pipeline tying tool integration, keyword research, code generation, and deployment into a single automated loop.
